Rule Name:                            TallyMCP — Tally XML port 9000
----------------------------------------------------------------------
Enabled:                              Yes
Direction:                            In
Profiles:                             Private
Grouping:
LocalIP:                              Any
RemoteIP:                             Any
Protocol:                             TCP
LocalPort:                            9000
RemotePort:                           Any
Edge traversal:                       No
Action:                               Allow
Ok.
